scripts.generate:all: node "production files/scripts/generate-courses.js" && node "production files/scripts/generate-compare.js" && node "production files/scripts/generate-projects.js" && node "production files/scripts/generate-resources.js" && node "production files/scripts/generate-cities.js" && node "production files/scripts/inject-bidirectional-projects-links.js" && node "production files/scripts/fix-internal-linking.js" && node "production files/scripts/update-schemas-from-config.js" && node "production files/scripts/fix-config-placeholders.js" && node "production files/scripts/apply-config-tags.js" && node "production files/scripts/restructure-pages.js" && node "production files/scripts/fix-fallback-script-paths.js" && node "production files/scripts/fix-og-completeness.js" && node "production files/scripts/clean-inline-css.js" && node "production files/scripts/cleanup-deleted-pages.js"
scripts.optimize:head: node "production files/scripts/fix-head-structure.js"
scripts.optimize:cleanup: node "production files/scripts/cleanup-comments.js" && node "production files/scripts/cleanup-duplicates.js" && node "production files/scripts/remove-empty-lines.js"
scripts.optimize:all: npm run optimize:critical-css && npm run optimize:head && npm run optimize:schemas && node "production files/scripts/inject-geo-signals.js" && npm run optimize:images && npm run optimize:pt-banner && npm run optimize:cleanup && node "production files/scripts/post-process.js" && node "production files/scripts/migrate-css-postbuild.js"
scripts.verify:all: npm run verify:seo && npm run verify:schema && npm run verify:accessibility && npm run verify:headings && npm run verify:tracking
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js && npm run optimize:all && npm run validate && npm run verify && npm run verify:all
